title: Method: export_profile
description: Serializes the profile identified by 'id' as a portable ExportedProfile document and writes it to 'path' on the daemon host's filesystem. The exported file omits the server-local id. Returns the path that was written.

id.description: Identifier of the profile to export.

path.description: Filesystem path on the daemon host where the exported file is written.
Echo of the path that was written.
